claims.text: The Transformer, based solely on attention mechanisms, achieves new state-of-the-art translation quality while being more parallelizable.
claims.source_text: We propose a new simple network architecture, the Transformer, based solely on attention mechanisms, dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely.

methods.name: Multi-Head Self-Attention
methods.source_text: Multi-head attention allows the model to jointly attend to information from different representation subspaces

methods.name: Positional Encoding
methods.source_text: we add "positional encodings" to the input embeddings at the bottoms of the encoder and decoder stacks

relations.explanation: Builds on Bahdanau-style attention but removes recurrence and uses pure multi-head self-attention.

evidence.text: Attention mechanisms have become an integral part of compelling sequence modeling and transduction models

relations.explanation: Outperforms prior attentional NMT on WMT English-to-German and English-to-French.

evidence.text: On the WMT 2014 English-to-German translation task, the big transformer model outperforms the best previously reported models

citation_contexts.sentence: Attention mechanisms have become an integral part of compelling sequence modeling and transduction models in various tasks, allowing modeling of dependencies without regard to their distance in the input or output sequences [2].
